title: malcolmia pygmaea
intro: Malcolmia pygmaea, also known as dwarf candytuft or small candytuft, is a low-growing, annual or biennial plant belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's extracts and preparations have been reported to have several health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and supporting the immune system. Malcolmia pygmaea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
